transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I need to cancel my appointment. I'm going to go abroad for a month and I won't be here.
AGENT: No problem at all. Safe travels! Your name and appointment details?
CALLER: Ankita Phadke. I had a follow-up with Dr. Sneha Kulkarni, dermatology, next Thursday.
AGENT: Found it. Cancelling Ankita Phadke, Thursday follow-up with Dr. Kulkarni. Done! When you're back, just call us to rebook.
CALLER: Will do. Will I need to explain the gap in treatment to the doctor?
AGENT: Just mention it to Dr. Kulkarni when you're back. A brief update on your skin condition during the time away will help her continue the treatment plan appropriately.
CALLER: Good advice. Thanks and bye!
AGENT: Enjoy your trip! See you when you're back.
